Amazon: Heavy focus on Amazon Leadership Principles (Customer Obsession, Ownership, Bias for Action). Expect behavioral questions to dominate, even in technical rounds. Always look for STAR method responses.
Google: Heavy focus on algorithmic efficiency, Big-O complexity, and edge cases. Expect highly theoretical and open-ended problems.
Microsoft: Focus on system design, object-oriented programming (OOP), debugging, and practical engineering over pure algorithm puzzles.
Meta: Focus on high-speed execution, bug-free code on the first run, and scale. Expect questions related to social graphs or high-traffic UI components.
